widget.convert: {"template": [ MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaTest(pos = (5, 5), size = (70, 70), png = 0), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (80, 10), size = (100, 60), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 1, color = 0xffffff, color_sel = 0xffffff), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (213, 10), size = (100, 60), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 2, color = 0xffffff, color_sel = 0xffffff), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (346, 10), size = (266, 60), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 3, color = 0xffffff, color_sel = 0xffffff), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (646, 10), size = (120, 60), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 4, color = 0xffffff, color_sel = 0xffffff), MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaTest(pos = (800, 20), size = (30, 30), png = 5), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (833, 10), size = (133, 60), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 6, color = 0xffffff, color_sel = 0xffffff), ], "fonts": [gFont("Regular", 18)], "itemHeight": 80 }
